snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Critical Nginx UI flaw CVE-2026-27944 exposes server backups"; content:"CVE-2026-27944"; nocase; sid:8482186; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3789 - Bytedesk SpringAIGiteeRestController SpringA"; content:"CVE-2026-3789"; nocase; sid:1229532; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3788 - Bytedesk SpringAIOpenrouterRestController Sp"; content:"CVE-2026-3788"; nocase; sid:9441457; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3787 - UltraVNC Windows Service cryptbase.dll uncon"; content:"CVE-2026-3787"; nocase; sid:7337371; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Caught in the Hook: RCE and API Token Exfiltration Through C"; content:"CVE-2025-59536"; nocase; sid:7699027; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3816 - OWASP DefectDojo SonarQubeParser/MSDefenderP"; content:"CVE-2026-3816"; nocase; sid:8176166; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 13 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 7 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
